questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '91eb87e5-5287-455d-a062-02582b77386e' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = 'be5d3972-0b45-483c-8d3b-b5fa2e958d7e'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '91eb87e5-5287-455d-a062-02582b77386e'; delete from question_items where id = '91eb87e5-5287-455d-a062-02582b77386e';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
